svg.text: AI Interview Coach — Full Implementation Flow (Step 1 to Finish)
Each box = one working section. Purple = main path · green = AI/online · red = proctoring/fail · gold = decision.
• Gaze: 2 head turns → ONE red warning → 4th = FAIL
• Auto offline mode · multi-provider AI fallback
Loads config, dark theme CSS, session_state defaults (the FSM "stage").
Built-in question bank + instant offline scoring.
Sidebar: provider + model picker + API key.
Shared host key (secrets/env) → every user has access.
Salted SHA-256 passwords (users.json). Sign-up creates a candidate.
Nothing else renders until logged in (st.stop()).
toggles → shareable CODE (used by candidates in 5).
Shares the same data folder. 📋 My Interviews.
• Target a company (80+/15 sectors) or General role
• OR paste a recruiter CODE → loads that custom interview → jumps to step 9
pypdf extracts text → AI returns skills, gaps, match %.
Camera auto-on (any laptop cam) · face auto-detected · photo auto-captured ·
human-voice meter · gaze monitor starts · recruiter's lockdown rules activate.
Green START unlocks ONLY after camera + face are confirmed.
Pick 1 of 38 languages, type code, submit.
AI dry-runs & judges correctness → shows output.
Type, or speak → Whisper transcribes to text.
AI Evaluator scores 1-10 with strength, fix,
Adaptive difficulty: avg ≥ 8.5 → next questions get harder.
Copy/paste, DevTools, tab-switch, full-screen exit logged.
Voice detector flags talking; fan/AC ignored. FaceMesh gaze.
2nd head turn → ONE big RED warning
Full-screen overlay; exam ends as FAILED;
No score. Saves a failed session for recruiters.
Downloads: DETAILED PDF report + FAILED PDF certificate
Animated score ring · skill radar · PDF certificate · share links ·
question breakdown · AI (or offline) coaching summary · TXT report.
Shared keys (secrets/env) → every user gets access.
Graceful errors. Offline → local scorers instead.
Camera self-view + auto face snapshot (the real gate).
Shared with the recruiter dashboard app.
Whole UI is a finite-state machine driven by st.session_state["stage"]: company_select → setup → syscheck → interviewing → (terminated | results).
Reliable: auth, scoring logic, dashboard, offline mode, PDF export. Best-effort: in-browser camera/gaze/voice (needs localhost or https; a deterrent, not tamper-proof).
